name: Peanut Minus Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Have ungreased baking sheets ready.
2. In a large bowl, combine peanut butter, maple syrup, and vanilla extract. Mix until smooth. Add brown rice flour and sea salt; mix well. Fold in chopped roasted peanuts.
3. Form cookies using about one tablespoon of dough for each cookie. Place the cookies on the prepared baking sheets, spacing them about 1 inch apart. Flatten gently with the tines of a fork.
4. Bake for 11 to 12 minutes, or until set. Allow cooling for 1 minute on the baking sheet before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Yield: 2 dozen cookies
